name: Zappallas, Inc.
summary: Zappallas, Inc. engages in the planning, development, and management of fortune-telling services for mobiles and PCs. The company operates through Mobile Services, Overseas, and Other segments. It is also involved in the planning, development, management, and event management of fortune-telling content focusing on video distribution service. In addition, Zappallas, Inc. engages in the telephone fortune-telling and management of media sites; online fortune-telling; travel business which include production of adult trips; and e-commerce business that offers baby supplies and kids equipment through mail order. The company was formerly known as Cyber-Biz Inc. and changed its name to Zappallas, Inc. in April 2001. Zappallas, Inc. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
